title: idea_completeness
description: The completeness judge's verdict on whether the idea is ready to draft: it must answer what problem it solves, why kitsoki is the right tool, and how an operator will use it.

complete.description: True when problem / why_kitsoki / usage are all answered well enough to draft.

problem.description: The problem the idea solves, as the judge understands it.

why_kitsoki.description: Why kitsoki (a deterministic-graph LLM-workflow engine) is the right tool for this.

usage.description: How an operator would use the change.

gaps.description: The concrete gaps that keep the idea from being complete; empty when complete.
